Black.description: Dataset-derived style guidance built from wardrobe recommendations and product examples. Choose flattering materials like Structured Cotton, Flowy Fabric, Lightweight Cotton, Jersey, Knits and patterns such as Curved Lines, Vertical Stripes, Bright Tops, Diagonal Lines, Simple Solids for color-smart outfits. Preferred accent tones include Earth Tones, Olive, Coral, Peach, Mustard. Keep jewelry subtle with Gold, Silver, Rose Gold. These suggestions combine both product-level recommendations and body-style guidance.
